novel_features.name: Front-page diff
novel_features.description: Show what changed on the front page since last check — stories that appeared, disappeared, or moved.

novel_features.name: Topic pulse
novel_features.description: What HN is saying about a topic this week — score, comment, frequency by day.

novel_features.name: Submission tracker
novel_features.description: Track a user's submissions with score buckets, traction rate, and best posting time hints.

novel_features.name: Hiring stats
novel_features.description: Aggregate Who's Hiring across recent months: languages, remote ratio, top companies.

novel_features.name: Controversial
novel_features.description: Find stories with the highest comment-to-point ratio — the polarizing discussions.

novel_features.name: Repost finder
novel_features.description: Has this URL been posted on HN before? Lists prior submissions with scores and dates.

novel_features.name: Story velocity
novel_features.description: Show a story's rank trajectory from local snapshots (climb, fall, stalled).

novel_features.name: Thread tldr (structured)
novel_features.description: Deterministic thread digest: top authors by reply count, root vs reply ratio, comment heat metric.

novel_features.name: Local FTS search
novel_features.description: Offline FTS5 search across every story and comment you've touched.

novel_features.name: Sync foundation
novel_features.description: Pull top/best/new lists into local SQLite for offline use and snapshot history.
